findings.description: Manley Madison Wood was the maternal grandfather of Jimmie Jewel Neal — that is, the father of her mother Martha J Wood. Manley was born about 1808 in Spartanburg, South Carolina, and died 10 July 1863 in Summit, Blount, Alabama.
supporting_sources: FamilySearch Family Tree compiled profile for Martha J Wood, listing Manley Madison Wood as father.
1860 U.S. Census entry for M M Wood and Martha Wood, Blount, Alabama, showing the couple's household.

findings.description: Martha Patsey Ford was the maternal grandmother of Jimmie Jewel Neal — that is, the mother of Martha J Wood and wife of Manley Madison Wood. Martha Patsey was born 28 October 1814 in Spartanburg, South Carolina, and died 14 August 1863 in Browns Valley, Blount, Alabama.
supporting_sources: FamilySearch Family Tree compiled profile for Martha J Wood, listing Martha Patsey Ford as mother.
1860 U.S. Census entry for M M Wood and Martha Wood, Blount, Alabama, showing the couple's household.
